2023-24 Pacific Tigers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 6-26 (0-16, 9th in WCC MBB)

Coach: Josh Newman (0-1), Leonard Perry (6-25)

SRS: -17.42 (351st of 362)
